name: Cranberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Skim milk or nonfat yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch glass pie plate with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
3. Mix the cranberries and half a cup of sugar together in the pie plate.
4. In a bowl, beat the egg whites until very frothy.
5. Add the remaining half cup of sugar, oil, honey, skim milk or nonfat yogurt, and Butter buds to the beaten egg whites. Beat well.
6. Mix in the flour.
7. Pour the batter over the cranberry mixture.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes.
9. Serve warm or cool.
10. Serves 8.
